enrichments.description: Coach introduces himself, shares personal transformation story, promotes live bootcamp coaching programs
teaching_points: Learning game can be a catalyst for broader self-development (weight loss, confidence, lifestyle)
Cold approach lets you meet women anywhere — gym, grocery store, coffee shop — in any city
Overcoming approach fear and learning basic fundamentals enables repeatable results like quick number closes

enrichments.description: Coach opens a woman on Miami beach with a restaurant question, teases her, gets her number

hook_point.signal: Target starts asking coach questions back ('why'd you come here') and volunteering personal info (fashion school), showing active engagement

checks_passed: Every technique claim has a specific segment citation and exact quote
No technique tagged that coach says NOT to do (no negations found in transcript)
No technique tagged from a different video — all evidence is from this transcript
Phase labels progress forward only: open → pre_hook → post_hook → close
Evidence strength is 'demonstrated' for all approach techniques (coach performed them live)
Topics match actual conversation content (food, origin, name, education, living situation, hobby, appearance)
corrections_made: Initially considered tagging 'DHV' for segments 113-115 (wholesome gentleman), but this maps more precisely to push_pull (contrasting himself against 'trash dudes') and disqualification ('recovering fuck boy'), so used those instead
Considered tagging 'screening' for segment 104 stoner comment, but it's a cold_read (assumption) not a screening question
remaining_concerns: Segments 101 and 107 are marked garbled — technique citations avoid these but nearby segments reference same conversational flow
The pre_hook phase is very brief (only segment 95) before target hooks at 96; this seems accurate given the target's immediate engagement but is unusually fast

Investment level rated 'medium': target shares info and asks questions but coach clearly drives most of the conversation; target gives number without resistance but doesn't show high emotional investment
